card.title: Pre-Primary (Play School, Nursery, KG IV & KG V)
card.description: Nurturing young minds through play-based learning, creativity, and early skill development in a warm, nurturing environment.

page.title: The Pre-Primary Experience
page.subtitle: Nursery to KG V: Where curiosity meets discovery in a nurturing environment.

headOfDepartment.name: Mrs. Mayoranda Sohlang
headOfDepartment.quote: Our goal is to create a safe haven where children don't just learn to read, but learn to love the process of discovery.

subPrograms.title: Play School
subPrograms.description: Introduction to classroom environment, basic communication, and early socialization through guided play activities.

subPrograms.title: Nursery
subPrograms.description: Focusing on social integration, sensory exploration, and basic motor skill development through play.

subPrograms.title: KG IV
subPrograms.description: Introduction to formal strokes, cursive readiness, and foundational numeracy within the NCERT framework.

subPrograms.title: KG V
subPrograms.description: Advanced life skills, cursive writing mastery, and preparation for the Primary transition.

curriculum.heading: The LEADS Custom Curriculum
curriculum.intro: While we align with the NCERT framework, we believe early childhood requires a deeper touch. Our custom curriculum integrates:

page.ctaSubtext: Admissions for the upcoming session are now open for Pre-Primary.
